items.title: Oil prices rise after US and Iran exchange fire in Hormuz strait
items.dek: US President Donald Trump says the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran is still in place.
items.body: US President Donald Trump says the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran is still in place.

items.title: Ethiopian woman's joy at rare quintuplets after 12 years trying for a baby
items.dek: The woman, 35, says she was praying for a baby and was "overjoyed" to be "blessed with five at once".
items.body: The woman, 35, says she was praying for a baby and was "overjoyed" to be "blessed with five at once".

items.title: Rebel Wilson accused of 'complete revision of history' as defamation case closes
items.dek: The Bridesmaids star claims an actress retracted a complaint about sexual harassment by a producer.
items.body: The Bridesmaids star claims an actress retracted a complaint about sexual harassment by a producer.
